Comprueba que tus opciones sean adecuadas Revisa y cambia las opciones de privacidad y seguridad. También proporcionan acceso a varias funciones adicionales que requieren iniciar sesión. Por ejemplo, cuando inicias sesión en Google Maps, puedes guardar tus direcciones de casa y del trabajo. Y cuando inicias sesión en YouTube, puedes hacer Me gusta en vídeos, suscribirte a canales y crear tu propio canal de YouTube. Tu contrato con Google Los Términos del Servicio de Google <https://notifications.google.com/g/p/ANiao5owEJdccljD7tzKMIrAmKHF5GWuNJZwAEpSoZbappG4BYcHo3UJ0N1rcfBckkQM9Itwx98-PeMtwMnCfB-qgEXOPHRZ87_UGnV9ll82H6Oz5uIzUAtj4tE_oNyJyAZB1Ft8jE4P0t7uGDqepb7vx43dOuhThJ83unSGJS7u6B8cpo2LVk18mZlArDZ_pWkMEqVA7S8IvGBMGwFiF9apm8LQGq9qRf1QrtJR-nJGQYtI1X1j7B_5xI8RXjO3NNd9EKgk7_w4WBpHDq8_RmGeQs7-28o57wS2222FaFc8yBSHlbReG8Sq83KKHaA7oMA>, los Términos del Servicio de YouTube <https://notifications.google.com/g/p/ANiao5pVxmtjoUahFZlORW4_lWpaqSkHZcc3_seQjjZ9KEUIrT01HS4bY2peJchr2RIkRW_nvKBfk4HjUEQGL1cXCq-y-WwgMuJxbI7hgmiDcD8_4sxDAZfNBeJXoX6o4cLMlKOBYa_wjVe-ijSklQn9VV2wFxoMSOA3I4j5jTyrOrnBcH0La3gp4-ppdmc3fKe2v6scskNmQl5CE1PrmStzWnXEXZ9BLa8chChbEfd-v-l1A_wrFmgXpz0RoT3lzCMSnFEUfClgcC0h3SD0NQT1jNYQnAfSQ6om2dHhamlDbTQvBKbVaOUdvPeLfIdsEg> y los términos adicionales de esta lista de servicios <https://notifications.google.com/g/p/ANiao5rrThpJG7ofxUmyAJePVbjCd-lqdmvM2MQzkWkAjeEJiIqFd4zDFC6vq1CM_RwAngOK7r8bXmQB7DoztYrPA_Y96283CCvKdw1o_Oy9fM9PgGWu9suuBcg9S5rzges3ga5TqdcKHYMFJcG9cqD011pYQTQHnCiIt7CkhROltugQbHKxFWvcamdUyjRfrsysjqux0vHrheEPtZWLhhD9aF6zOlmDOGD2NwKgW15xRpiJZ9NGTUljk8Pfb_AdDN84LcW2kNx6fUJX-KvpxpqAG0eU5Mkh2nik2-AxXb0gRjDYxzZO-lgcwAD4METYoddzylkJq012FMqNRfoq6rm4ZtE> ayudan a definir tu relación con Google. En ellos, se describe lo que puedes esperar al hacer uso de los servicios de Google, incluido YouTube, y lo que Google espera de ti. Los servicios de Google los proporciona y se contratan con: Google Ireland Limited Gordon House, Barrow Street Dublin 4 Ireland 800000296 support-eu@google.com Derecho de desistimiento Si eres un consumidor, tu contrato con Google está sujeto por ley a un derecho automático de desistimiento en un plazo de 14 días a partir de la fecha de celebración del contrato. Para ejercer el derecho de desistimiento, deberás notificarnos tu decisión de desistir del contrato a través de una declaración inequívoca (por ejemplo, una carta enviada por correo postal o un correo electrónico). No es necesario que indiques el motivo del desistimiento, que se considera comunicado a tiempo si nos envías la solicitud de desistimiento antes de que venza el plazo establecido. Las respuestas a este correo electrónico no se supervisan. Si tienes alguna pregunta sobre tu nueva cuenta, seguramente encontrarás la respuesta en el Centro de Ayuda <https://notifications.google.com/g/p/ANiao5ouPjzW7BvQuivIjn0QFAIY7Z3xBC5jykUIw8mPwXfPrAcLWLNoi3D77tmGZ-YL3uGSSyTWLcnTL-sWQuo1LlP9LTC7pbjO31P1INhxDpzcMPjpjgD8wvBYI8oKgHwUgRKgVL9MHilSAx9GSlKQPUjc7ADk5Zdt6ehPWaaIK_00BhPV1SqfPovmcsp-wU-7R_z6RIC6WlTKN0oXAY-5Uj1EfHG5Xge8qPbYO6hK7cl7kI4UGy9W88GjPZ1lde2Ju9Ew0usrC8Zf6qvJJRsbR5pCafXnFdHpyXyn_zmEPDg7lHclKtAKrw>. Subject: Te damos la bienvenida a iCloud
From: iCloud <noreply@email.apple.com>
To: ufosnowboard@gmail.com
Date: 2024-01-18T14:52:18+00:00
Body:
Te damos la bienvenida a iCloud Tu ID de Apple es ufosnowboard@gmail.com Ahora puedes iniciar sesión en iCloud.com para utilizar Pages, Numbers y Keynote para iCloud con 1 GB de almacenamiento gratuito. Inicia sesión ahora https://www.icloud.com/ ========== # Productividad en la Web Crea documentos, hojas de cálculo y presentaciones espectaculares con Pages, Numbers y Keynote para iCloud. Comparte enlaces a documentos para que otras personas puedan editarlos de forma simultánea. Además, las potentes funciones y opciones de formato conseguirán que te olvides de que estás usando un navegador. Más información: https://www.apple.com/es/iwork-for-icloud/ # iCloud en iPhone, iPad y Mac Esta cuenta, con acceso únicamente desde la web, se actualizará de forma automática cuando inicies sesión en iCloud a través de los ajustes de tu Mac o dispositivo iOS. Obtendrás 5 GB de almacenamiento gratuito y tendrás acceso a todas las prestaciones de iCloud. Más información: https://www.apple.com/es/icloud/ iCloud es un servicio de Apple. ID de Apple: https://appleid.apple.com/choose-your-country/ Soporte: https://www.apple.com/support/icloud/ww Términos y condiciones: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/icloud/ww/ Política de privacidad: https://www.apple.com/legal/privacy/es/ Copyright 2024 Apple Distribution International Ltd. text:
Subject: RE: Request from Pablo Picouto Garcia (Get in touch)
From: Anastasia Lebedeva <alebedeva@allcorrectgames.com>
To: "ufosnowboard@gmail.com" <ufosnowboard@gmail.com>
Date: 2024-02-08T15:51:11+00:00
Body:
Hi Pablo, How’s your Thursday going? I was just curious if my previous email has reached you safely. I’d love to learn more about ufo snowboard! Can’t wait to hear back from you. Cheers, Anastasiia From: Anastasia Lebedeva <alebedeva@allcorrectgames.com> Sent: Wednesday, January 31, 2024 3:10 PM To: ufosnowboard@gmail.com Cc: site <site@allcorrectgames.com> Subject: RE: Request from Pablo Picouto Garcia (Get in touch) Hey Pablo, Anastasiia here, an account manager at Allcorrect. It’s great to e-meet you! 😊 Thanks for your request, we greatly appreciate it. As a passionate snowboarder myself, I am very much interested in contributing to your title 🤩 Could you please share a bit more about your demands? For localization, what languages do you have in mind? Also, are there texts that you could share with me so I could prepare a proper estimate time- and budget-wise? We exclude tags, repetitions and placeholders from the calculation, so actual texts would be great to have at hand! In case you feel like we need to sign an NDA first, please, drop me a line so I can send our standard form your way for consideration. Alternatively, we could jump on a brief call to introduce ourselves, share the details of the project and our processes. What do you think? Can’t wait to hear back from you! [cid:image005.png@01DA5AAF.055368E0] Best Regards, Anastasiia Lebedeva Account Manager www.allcorrectgames.com<http://www.allcorrectgames.com> alebedeva@allcorrectgames.com<mailto:alebedeva@allcorrectgames.com> Discord: anastasiialebedeva [cid:image006.png@01DA5AAF.055368E0]<https://www.linkedin.com/in/anastasiia-lebedeva-181870127/> From: wp <wp@allcorrectgames.com<mailto:wp@allcorrectgames.com>> Sent: Wednesday, January 31, 2024 1:17 PM To: site <site@allcorrectgames.com<mailto:site@allcorrectgames.com>> Subject: Request from Pablo Picouto Garcia (Get in touch) Hello, you have received a request from the Get in touch form From: Pablo Picouto Garcia Email: ufosnowboard@gmail.com<mailto:ufosnowboard@gmail.com> Message Body: This snowboarding game is inspired by Alto's Adventure, aiming to create a relaxing atmosphere where players can unwind and enjoy various environments while attempting to dodge pitfalls. It also features a multiplayer mode for users on the same network. https://apps.apple.com/es/app/ufo-snowboard/id6474542185

text:
Subject: RE: Request from Pablo Picouto Garcia (Get in touch)
From: Anastasia Lebedeva <alebedeva@allcorrectgames.com>
To: Pablo Picouto <ufosnowboard@gmail.com>
Date: 2024-02-12T12:46:49+00:00
Body:
Hi Pablo, Hope you are well off into the new week! Sorry for being a bore but I believe, I do not fully understand the specs of your request. Could you kindly elaborate on what you mean by “determining the potential of the game”? Performing market/ competitor research for considering future investment in the game? As for the question re. advertisement: as a game content studio, we focus mainly on localization, LQA, art and narrative design. Here<https://www.canva.com/design/DAFccEAqbHw/xSEXQFO42u6lNOdwzLijmA/view?utm_content=DAFccEAqbHw&utm_campaign=designshare&utm_medium=link&utm_source=publishsharelink#1> is a brief overview of what services we offer; feel free to check it out! Could you please specify what you have in mind saying “advertising aspect”? With this info at hand, I could find ways to be of help for you 😊 Thanks ahead, Anastasiia From: Pablo Picouto <ufosnowboard@gmail.com> Sent: Monday, February 12, 2024 9:17 AM To: Anastasia Lebedeva <alebedeva@allcorrectgames.com> Subject: Re: Request from Pablo Picouto Garcia (Get in touch) Good morning, Anastasia, I apologize for the delay in my response; I've been quite busy recently. Regarding the game, my primary focus is to determine its potential before considering any investment. Since it's already available on the Apple Store, I was wondering if you could review it and share your thoughts. [cid:image003.png@01DA5DB9.ED763190] [cid:image004.jpg@01DA5DB9.ED763190]<https://apps.apple.com/es/app/ufo-snowboard/id6474542185> ufo snowboard<https://apps.apple.com/es/app/ufo-snowboard/id6474542185> ufo snowboard<https://apps.apple.com/es/app/ufo-snowboard/id6474542185> As for the advertising aspect, could you please provide me with an email detailing your standard procedures and how you typically handle such projects? I must apologize in advance for any delayed responses from my side, as I am currently employed full-time and only work on this game during my free time. Best regards, On 8 Feb 2024, at 16:51, Anastasia Lebedeva <alebedeva@allcorrectgames.com<mailto:alebedeva@allcorrectgames.com>> wrote: Hi Pablo, How’s your Thursday going? I was just curious if my previous email has reached you safely. I’d love to learn more about ufo snowboard! Can’t wait to hear back from you. It’s great to e-meet you! 😊 Thanks for your request, we greatly appreciate it. As a passionate snowboarder myself, I am very much interested in contributing to your title 🤩 Could you please share a bit more about your demands? For localization, what languages do you have in mind? Also, are there texts that you could share with me so I could prepare a proper estimate time- and budget-wise? We exclude tags, repetitions and placeholders from the calculation, so actual texts would be great to have at hand! In case you feel like we need to sign an NDA first, please, drop me a line so I can send our standard form your way for consideration. Alternatively, we could jump on a brief call to introduce ourselves, share the details of the project and our processes. What do you think? Can’t wait to hear back from you! <image005.png> Best Regards, Anastasiia Lebedeva Account Manager www.allcorrectgames.com<http://www.allcorrectgames.com/> alebedeva@allcorrectgames.com<mailto:alebedeva@allcorrectgames.com> Discord: anastasiialebedeva <image006.png><https://www.linkedin.com/in/anastasiia-lebedeva-181870127/> From: wp <wp@allcorrectgames.com<mailto:wp@allcorrectgames.com>> Sent: Wednesday, January 31, 2024 1:17 PM To: site <site@allcorrectgames.com<mailto:site@allcorrectgames.com>> Subject: Request from Pablo Picouto Garcia (Get in touch) Hello, you have received a request from the Get in touch form From: Pablo Picouto Garcia Email: ufosnowboard@gmail.com<mailto:ufosnowboard@gmail.com> Message Body: This snowboarding game is inspired by Alto's Adventure, aiming to create a relaxing atmosphere where players can unwind and enjoy various environments while attempting to dodge pitfalls. It also features a multiplayer mode for users on the same network. https://apps.apple.com/es/app/ufo-snowboard/id6474542185

Subject: SuperSpring is here! Win major prizes for your game 🌸
From: Supersonic <supersonic-communications@unity3d.com>
To: ufosnowboard@gmail.com
Date: 2024-04-15T03:18:37-06:00
Body:
Hi there, SuperSpring is here! 🌸 This season, we’re looking for the next big runner, simulation, or puzzle game and we’re giving away huge prizes for the best ones! Keep in mind that you can only test 5 games throughout the contest, so pick the top concepts that are most likely to grow big. Here’s what’s at stake: This season, we’re shaking things up You can get up to $20,000 for testing a marketable prototype, and then exit the publishing process. text:
Subject: Obtén más información sobre nuestros Términos del Servicio actualizados
From: Google <no-reply@accounts.google.com>
To: ufosnowboard@gmail.com
Date: 2024-04-19T16:39:12-07:00
Body:
ufosnowboard@gmail.com <https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=ufosnowboard%40gmail.com&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fpolicies.google.com%2Fterms%2Fupdate%3Futm_source%3Dtos2024-email%26utm_medium%3Demail> En 22 de mayo del 2024 vamos a actualizar nuestros Términos del Servicio, por lo que queríamos informarte con antelación. Estos cambios no afectarán a la forma en la que utilizas nuestros servicios <https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=ufosnowboard%40gmail.com&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fpolicies.google.com%2Fterms%2Fservice-specific%3Futm_source%3Dtos2024-email%26utm_medium%3Demail>, sino que te ayudarán a entender mejor qué puedes esperar de Google, y qué esperamos nosotros de ti, al usar nuestros servicios de Google. Puedes consultar los nuevos términos aquí <https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=ufosnowboard%40gmail.com&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fpolicies.google.com%2Fterms%2Fupdate%3Futm_source%3Dtos2024-email%26utm_medium%3Demail>. Al final de este correo, también resumimos los cambios. *¿Qué debo hacer?* - *Si no tienes la edad mínima para gestionar tu propia cuenta de Google <https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=ufosnowboard%40gmail.com&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fsupport.google.com%2Faccounts%2Fanswer%2F1350409%3Futm_source%3Dtos2024-email%26utm_medium%3Demail>:* - Hemos enviado este correo a tu padre, madre o tutor/a para que puedan ayudarte a comprender mejor los cambios que hacemos. - Consulta este correo con tu padre, madre o tutor/a para decidir si necesitas hacer algo diferente con tu cuenta. - * Si eres padre, madre o tutor/a y permites que tu hijo/a utilice los servicios:* - Revisa con tu hijo/a los cambios en nuestros términos para que pueda decidir con tu ayuda si debe hacer algún cambio en su cuenta. - Recuerda que estos términos se te aplican a ti y eres responsable de la actividad que tu hijo/a lleve a cabo en los servicios. - *Si eres el administrador de una cuenta de empresa o de centro educativo de Google Workspace y has permitido que tus usuarios accedan a los servicios adicionales de Google <https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=ufosnowboard%40gmail.com&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fsupport.google.com%2Fa%2Fanswer%2F181865%3Futm_source%3Dtos2024-email%26utm_medium%3Demail>: * - Los nuevos Términos del Servicio no afectarán al contrato de Google Workspace entre Google y tu organización. Estos nuevos términos solo se aplicarán a aquellos usuarios a los que hayas dado acceso a los servicios adicionales de Google <https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=ufosnowboard%40gmail.com&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fsupport.google.com%2Fa%2Fanswer%2F181865%3Futm_source%3Dtos2024-email%26utm_medium%3Demail>. Siempre puedes gestionar en tu consola de administración si tus usuarios tienen acceso a los servicios adicionales de Google y a cuáles de ellos. - *Si eres distribuidor de Google Workspace cuyos clientes han permitido que sus usuarios accedan a los servicios adicionales de Google <https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=ufosnowboard%40gmail.com&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fsupport.google.com%2Fa%2Fanswer%2F181865%3Futm_source%3Dtos2024-email%26utm_medium%3Demail>:* - Los nuevos Términos del Servicio no afectarán a tu contrato de Google Workspace con tus clientes. Estos nuevos términos solo se aplicarán a los usuarios de tus clientes que hayan obtenido acceso a los servicios adicionales de Google <https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=ufosnowboard%40gmail.com&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fsupport.google.com%2Fa%2Fanswer%2F181865%3Futm_source%3Dtos2024-email%26utm_medium%3Demail>. Tus clientes siempre pueden gestionar en su consola de administración si sus usuarios tienen acceso a los servicios adicionales de Google y a cuáles de ellos. - *Si eres otro tipo de usuario de los servicios <https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=ufosnowboard%40gmail.com&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fpolicies.google.com%2Fterms%2Fservice-specific%3Futm_source%3Dtos2024-email%26utm_medium%3Demail>: * - Lee este correo para comprender los términos actualizados y las opciones que tienes para tomar medidas al respecto. - Si aceptas los nuevos términos, no es necesario que hagas nada más. *¿Qué va a cambiar?* Puedes consultar los nuevos Términos del Servicio de Google <https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=ufosnowboard%40gmail.com&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fpolicies.google.com%2Fterms%2Fupdate%3Futm_source%3Dtos2024-email%26utm_medium%3Demail>. A grandes rasgos, esto es lo que abarca esta actualización: - *Términos de IA generativa.* Vamos a trasladar nuestros Términos Adicionales de IA Generativa <https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=ufosnowboard%40gmail.com&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fpolicies.google.com%2Fterms%2Fgenerative-ai%3Futm_source%3Dtos2024-email%26utm_medium%3Demail> a nuestros Términos del Servicio principales y añadiremos otras aclaraciones relacionadas con la IA. Por ejemplo, no reclamaremos la propiedad del contenido original generado por nuestros...

text:
Subject: Superstories is here. Read me to get top creative and design tips, Supersonic news, and important updates
From: Supersonic <supersonic-communications@unity3d.com>
To: ufosnowboard@gmail.com
Date: 2024-04-26T02:11:18-06:00
Body:
Hey there, Enjoy this month’s Superstories - the latest tips, tricks, insights, and inspiration for making great hyper-casual games lie ahead :) There’s just one month left to submit your runner, simulation, or puzzle game to qualify for huge prizes like, $200,000 for every published game, $20,000 for testing a marketable prototype, and more. Submit your game http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/edium-email-utm-campaign-april/mfvtj/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k Submit your game http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/edium-email-utm-campaign-april/mfvtj/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k What's trending Jam puzzles with similar tap mechanics are skipping progression boost RVs, and instead monetizing players with IAP bundles. Gate runners that focus on size changes, character evolution, or storytelling to catch users’ attention continue to see lower CPI. Simulation games, like GossipMaster, that use storytelling and decision making in their creatives see low CPI. Top tips from the team http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/edium-email-utm-campaign-april/mfvtm/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/edium-email-utm-campaign-april/mfvtq/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k In the news Supersonic's SuperSpring contest is rewarding puzzle, simulation, and runner games developers It’s a great time to be a Supersonic partner! On top of huge cash prizes to be won this SuperSpring, we’re also announcing our Retention Plugin to help you speed up iterations and increase engagement. Find out more in this article from our friends at Pocketgamer. Learn more http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/n-and-runner-games-developers-/mfvtt/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k Learn more http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/n-and-runner-games-developers-/mfvtt/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k Get creative Teamwork makes the dream work Merging two winning creatives for Build A Queen into one longer creative significantly expanded reach, increasing spend 32% on Unity. Get ‘em thinking New versions of winning playables for Color Match combine new designs and IQ test mechanics with older mechanics to increase player engagement, resulting in a 16% increase in ironSource spend. Sinking the long shot Doubling the length of creatives for Bazooka Boy resulted in nearly doubling spend, increasing it by 96% for both ironSource and Unity networks on Android. Press play http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/edium-email-utm-campaign-april/mfvtx/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k This SuperMonday we kicked off SuperSpring and shared some top tips for creating chart-topping simulation, puzzle, and runner games. Missed the kick off? We got you. Check out the recording right here: Check it out http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/edium-email-utm-campaign-april/mfvtx/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k Check it out http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/edium-email-utm-campaign-april/mfvtx/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k Coming soon Ask Me Anything (AMA) session May 16th at 11am GMT Mark your calendar http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/0799-WN-ChDmVkOxS1aF6uE7sSp3WQ/mfvv1/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k Mark your calendar http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/0799-WN-ChDmVkOxS1aF6uE7sSp3WQ/mfvv1/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k Got questions about ideation or best practices for building your game? Our Supersonic experts have answers 🤓 Join our Ask Me Anything (AMA) on May 16th at 11am GMT where you can ask our publishing, monetization, creative, and game design experts anything and everything in a live Q&A. Ready to submit your game? Submit your game http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/edium-email-utm-campaign-april/mfvtj/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k Submit your game http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/edium-email-utm-campaign-april/mfvtj/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k unsubscribe http://go.pardot.com/unsubscribe/u/989512/560d38842e868b31054036203b0a01faa0df6916cfc2cf043fe45c65dfac5bf3/409508892 Supersonic from Unity 30 3rd Street San Francisco, CA http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/company-supersonic-studios-/mfvv4/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/supersonic-studios-/mfvv7/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/annel-UC8GQmIY3Bb4HbFHBbm3z0eA/mfvvb/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/uperstories-utm-campaign-april/mfvvf/409508892/h/HGcc2qfC__q44kaar3B1oHRPr_PI3hdIGJzhnq29G7k

Subject: The season is almost over! Don’t miss out on $20,000 for your prototype
From: Supersonic <supersonic-communications@unity3d.com>
To: ufosnowboard@gmail.com
Date: 2024-05-16T01:59:44-06:00
Body:
TODAY get all your questions answered by game publishing experts during our live Ask Me Anything session 🤓 Hey, Our SuperSpring contest is blossoming 🌷 but the season is almost over! Got questions about ideation? Best practices for building your game? TODAY at 11 AM GMT is our Ask Me Anything (AMA) where you can ask publishing, monetization, creative and game design experts anything you want in a live Q&A session. Join the livestream http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/1310-WN-ChDmVkOxS1aF6uE7sSp3WQ/mmzy2/431940091/h/dHiyDg7JjTw0qrQmkU_nqmfduGJTy1u68cyvCAv8Ajg Join the livestream http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/1310-WN-ChDmVkOxS1aF6uE7sSp3WQ/mmzy2/431940091/h/dHiyDg7JjTw0qrQmkU_nqmfduGJTy1u68cyvCAv8Ajg You have until May 27 to test your game and get $20,000 if it’s marketable. There’s a lot more at stake, like $300 for every prototype tested and a $200,000 minimum guarantee for every published game.* Don’t miss out - submit your game! Enter before it’s too late http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/mail-utm-campaign-superspring3/mmzy5/431940091/h/dHiyDg7JjTw0qrQmkU_nqmfduGJTy1u68cyvCAv8Ajg Enter before it’s too late http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/mail-utm-campaign-superspring3/mmzy5/431940091/h/dHiyDg7JjTw0qrQmkU_nqmfduGJTy1u68cyvCAv8Ajg *Terms & Conditions http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/mail-utm-campaign-superspring3/mmzy8/431940091/h/dHiyDg7JjTw0qrQmkU_nqmfduGJTy1u68cyvCAv8Ajg unsubscribe http://go.pardot.com/unsubscribe/u/989512/560d38842e868b31054036203b0a01faa0df6916cfc2cf043fe45c65dfac5bf3/431940091 Supersonic from Unity 30 3rd Street San Francisco, CA http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/company-supersonic-studios/mmzyc/431940091/h/dHiyDg7JjTw0qrQmkU_nqmfduGJTy1u68cyvCAv8Ajg http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/supersonic-studios-/mmzyg/431940091/h/dHiyDg7JjTw0qrQmkU_nqmfduGJTy1u68cyvCAv8Ajg http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/annel-UC8GQmIY3Bb4HbFHBbm3z0eA/mmzyk/431940091/h/dHiyDg7JjTw0qrQmkU_nqmfduGJTy1u68cyvCAv8Ajg http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/mail-utm-campaign-superspring3/mmzyn/431940091/h/dHiyDg7JjTw0qrQmkU_nqmfduGJTy1u68cyvCAv8Ajg

text:
Subject: Superstories in June: Refer friends to win cash, puzzle trends, and new platform features
From: Supersonic <supersonic-communications@unity3d.com>
To: ufosnowboard@gmail.com
Date: 2024-06-24T02:11:18-06:00
Body:
Read me for the latest tips, trends, and news from Supersonic Hey there, Enjoy this month’s Superstories - the latest tips, tricks, insights, and inspiration for making great hyper-casual games lie ahead :) Reminder - Your friends could help you win huge prizes! Refer a friend to Supersonic and you could win up to $100,000 💎 All you need to do is send this link http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/refer-friend-syg/nfbgq/478522398/h/2c2tQPjBbGZwxhG6zhP0J8bNnjtBjN1whWB9xgeWObI to your friend and get them to submit their game. If they get their game approved, you can win at the soft launch, iteration, and publishing stages of your friend’s game! So what are you waiting for? Make your friendships worthwhile 😉 Refer your friend now http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/medium-email-utm-campaign-june/nfbgt/478522398/h/2c2tQPjBbGZwxhG6zhP0J8bNnjtBjN1whWB9xgeWObI Refer your friend now http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/medium-email-utm-campaign-june/nfbgt/478522398/h/2c2tQPjBbGZwxhG6zhP0J8bNnjtBjN1whWB9xgeWObI What's trending Hybrid puzzles that use limited spaces are monetizing well thanks to the increased difficulty which drives users to complete IAP Solve IQ themes paired with complex levels in jam puzzle creatives are proving to be able to hook high quality users Jam puzzles are dominating the hybrid-casual charts, their limited spaces requiring users to plan moves ahead is proving to be a compelling mechanic Get more actionable tips to improve your game, like this blog on puzzle games http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/medium-email-utm-campaign-june/nfbgx/478522398/h/2c2tQPjBbGZwxhG6zhP0J8bNnjtBjN1whWB9xgeWObI , by visiting the Supersonic resources hub http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/medium-email-utm-campaign-june/nfbh1/478522398/h/2c2tQPjBbGZwxhG6zhP0J8bNnjtBjN1whWB9xgeWObI Top tips from the team http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/medium-email-utm-campaign-june/nfbgx/478522398/h/2c2tQPjBbGZwxhG6zhP0J8bNnjtBjN1whWB9xgeWObI http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/medium-email-utm-campaign-june/nfbh4/478522398/h/2c2tQPjBbGZwxhG6zhP0J8bNnjtBjN1whWB9xgeWObI Get creative A touch of Summer color 🌸 Color Match incorporated seasonal colors and themes, like pink flowers and red popsicles, in their creatives leading to a 12% uplift in Spend on the Unity network. Playing the long game 🙈 Hide N Seek integrated extended videos in their campaigns, doubling engagement for one creative and boosting spend 13% for the campaign on the ironSource network. New on the platform New KPI breakdown: RV engagement rate We’ve added a new KPI to measure the engagement rate of your RV placements! Track how users interact with rewarded videos and get a breakdown by placement to understand how different placements affect user engagement, so you can optimize for max user interaction and revenue. Wisdom SDK ⁠Support for new Apple regulation The Wisdom SDK has been updated to support the latest Apple regulations for app privacy and data usage, including Apple’s new requirements for app transparency and user consent. This helps to avoid potential penalties and app rejections and also builds trust with users by adhering to the highest standards of privacy and data protection. Coming soon SuperMonday July 8 at 11AM GMT Sign up now http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/6396-WN-Eq-U--0VSEyQ6sL2n67mnQ/nfbh7/478522398/h/2c2tQPjBbGZwxhG6zhP0J8bNnjtBjN1whWB9xgeWObI Sign up now http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/6396-WN-Eq-U--0VSEyQ6sL2n67mnQ/nfbh7/478522398/h/2c2tQPjBbGZwxhG6zhP0J8bNnjtBjN1whWB9xgeWObI We’re cracking the puzzle genre wide open. Uri Ron, Senior Market Research Manager, and Guy Agiv, Director of Product Design, will be sharing market trends and their top tips on building the next puzzle hit. Unite Shanghai http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/unite2024/nfbhb/478522398/h/2c2tQPjBbGZwxhG6zhP0J8bNnjtBjN1whWB9xgeWObI July 24-25 Meet us at the Supersonic Booth or at our APAC Publishing Lead David Wang’s session on taking your game from prototype to hit. We can’t wait to see you there! text:
Subject: SplitMetrics AI—an open letter from our CEO
From: "Max Kamenkov, CEO of SplitMetrics" <max@splitmetrics.com>
To: ufosnowboard@gmail.com
Date: 2024-09-24T13:12:40+01:00
Body:
The new era of mobile marketing is here. SplitMetrics AI Launch (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VVK2965-7v_MW7LsqLv73whZFVhPn1w5llLfSN4WpFgb3pxJzW6N1vHY6lZ3kzW1yr2S26hX9f_W2BJkjj1QJqLJW7XL6579lvTW6W6HyZZF3F3hK0Vn05Lp15X6WrW4vP-tL5rz0ZcN2qXC4gzLr1FW3S9kNT4C5998W5BZfp_97KCL_W5kt7Nw4tLCFKW2r_JNP7DlwGxW8T9LrR4B7djwW6041PC88xvy_W7pRfV-8w5F3xW8Tgp237xwcstW7wgy4H6ZwXXWW35ZpMN1TT16RW1w4vjC26K2dXW4YXG8D36mgG0W1X3gS55s1lJrW2p1v9M1SfMnfW5vzdR02K5jmZf6K7Jnd04 ) Dear Ufo, Today I’m proud to announce SplitMetrics AI (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VVK2965-7v_MW7LsqLv73whZFVhPn1w5llLfSN4WpFgb3pxJzW6N1vHY6lZ3kzW1yr2S26hX9f_W2BJkjj1QJqLJW7XL6579lvTW6W6HyZZF3F3hK0Vn05Lp15X6WrW4vP-tL5rz0ZcN2qXC4gzLr1FW3S9kNT4C5998W5BZfp_97KCL_W5kt7Nw4tLCFKW2r_JNP7DlwGxW8T9LrR4B7djwW6041PC88xvy_W7pRfV-8w5F3xW8Tgp237xwcstW7wgy4H6ZwXXWW35ZpMN1TT16RW1w4vjC26K2dXW4YXG8D36mgG0W1X3gS55s1lJrW2p1v9M1SfMnfW5vzdR02K5jmZf6K7Jnd04 ) , our research and development center, dedicated to solving the most pressing marketing performance challenges through the power of AI. Almost 15 years ago, when I completed my degree in AI, it wasn’t obvious that this technology would reshape entire industries. I’ve watched firsthand as the cloud and mobile revolutions transformed the way businesses operate and grow. Today, we stand on the brink of an even greater transformation— one driven by AI. Let me be direct: if you’re not already using AI to enhance your app marketing, you’re losing ground. Time, money, and opportunities are slipping away. AI is no longer optional; it’s essential for staying competitive—for both you and SplitMetrics. At SplitMetrics, we’re committed to leading this change. Our mission is simple: to improve the efficiency and effectiveness of app user acquisition through groundbreaking technologies. In the next few years, we will enable advertisers to increase business revenue through innovations such as bid and budget optimization, recommendation systems, and more. As a company, we’ve been solely focused on Apple Search Ads for 8 years, and for the last 2 years we’ve been extensively investing in AI and machine learning to set new industry standards, researching and testing proprietary AI models for campaign optimization. So we know the time, effort, and investment it takes to build something that is battle-tested and has real impact—a technology that predicts and optimizes bids more effectively than a human can. A big thank you to our customers and employees for supporting this vision and journey forward! Read more about our proprietary AI models at splitmetrics.com/ai. Hear the latest Supersonic news first, access special promotions, and have your questions answered in exclusive Q&As with Supersonic experts (plus a whole lot more). Follow Supersonic on LinkedIn http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/company-supersonic-studios-/rzdsh/681557498/h/I2Mn6BaW1jZbb4gB11WlcdPIDi8SIJ5vCafGq7autXk to make sure you don’t miss out on the launch 🚀 New on the platform Be your own creative expert with the Supersonic Top Creatives Library Browse through tons of recent top-trending Supersonic creatives, updated every month by our experts. Filter by genre, OS, game mechanics, and controls to find inspiration relevant to your game. Check it out on the Knowledge Hub of the Supersonic platform and start growing your game like a creative expert! Try it for yourself on the Supersonic platform! http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-nov/rzdsl/681557498/h/I2Mn6BaW1jZbb4gB11WlcdPIDi8SIJ5vCafGq7autXk http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-nov/rzdsl/681557498/h/I2Mn6BaW1jZbb4gB11WlcdPIDi8SIJ5vCafGq7autXk http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-nov/rzdsp/681557498/h/I2Mn6BaW1jZbb4gB11WlcdPIDi8SIJ5vCafGq7autXk Get ready to transform your hybrid game into a profitable SuperHybrid! Join forces with our publishing experts to take your hybrid game from zero to hero. Together, we'll make your game unstoppable with the financial support you need to power up your game development. Submit your game to earn: Ready to start? Submissions open on December 2 🦹‍♀️ Learn more http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-nov/rzdsp/681557498/h/I2Mn6BaW1jZbb4gB11WlcdPIDi8SIJ5vCafGq7autXk Learn more http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-nov/rzdsp/681557498/h/I2Mn6BaW1jZbb4gB11WlcdPIDi8SIJ5vCafGq7autXk What's trending Some hybrid runners with weapon themes combined with progression layers are seeing strong playtime and retention, but CPI remains high. Hybrid puzzles continue to perform well, particularly those that show original gameplay in their creatives and have innovative themes. Top trending creative themes that are seeing lower CPI include vehicles, cleaning/stacking mechanics, and shooting/aiming gameplay. Get more actionable tips to improve your game by visiting the Supersonic resources hub http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-nov/rzdss/681557498/h/I2Mn6BaW1jZbb4gB11WlcdPIDi8SIJ5vCafGq7autXk . Body:
Get your year in games wrapped with Supersonic 🎁 http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-dec/sh5y6/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc Hey there, Enjoy this month’s Superstories - the latest tips, tricks, insights, and inspiration for making great mobile games lie ahead :) Happy holidays from Supersonic Happy holidays and season’s greetings to all our partners. We hope the season brings you as much joy and happiness as your games bring to millions of people around the world. Supersonic LinkedIn newsletter, Keep it Super, is where you can find the latest Supersonic news, access exclusive content, and have your questions answered in exclusive Q&As with Supersonic experts (plus a whole lot more). Subscribe to the newsletter http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-it-super-7267052847714684929-/sh5y9/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc to make sure you never miss out on an edition 🗞️ New on our platform Haven’t tried the Supersonic Top Creatives Library yet? Give your creatives some festive sparkle this holiday season with our new Top Creatives Library ✨ Browse through tons of recent top-trending Supersonic creatives, updated every month by our experts. Filter by genre, OS, game mechanics, and controls to find references relevant to your game. Check it out in the Knowledge Hub on the Supersonic platform! http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/watch-v-UCX6VWdOXpw/sh5yd/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc Try it on the Supersonic platform http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-dec/sh5yh/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc Try it on the Supersonic platform http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-dec/sh5yh/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-dec/sh5yl/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc With a great game comes great opportunities! Don’t skip this opportunity to get the financial support you need to power up your game development. Submissions for SuperHybrid are open until January 30. Submit your game to earn: Ready? Submissions are open now 🦹‍♀️ Learn more http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-dec/sh5yl/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc Learn more http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-dec/sh5yl/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc What’s trending Idle RPG games are monetizing well thanks to high fail rates and strong progression mechanics requiring users to upgrade frequently Some jam puzzles are seeing good IAP monetization by adding time and limited space pressure points Hybrid puzzles remain the hybrid-casual genre monetizing best with IAP, though some titles are starting to decline Get more actionable tips to improve your game by visiting the Supersonic resources hub. http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-dec/sh5yp/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc Get creative Choose your adventure Family Life’s latest playable ads used dramatic narrative options and new illustrations to allow users to choose between happy and sad endings. The result was an 87% increase on ironSource and Unity networks. Make your creatives great again Conquer Countries upgraded a topical political playable concept with new toggle features and illustrations to drive a 33% increase in spend on social channels. Bewitch the audience Using revamped creatives that leveraged new environments with Halloween themes and voice overs, Build A Queen was able to increase spend 33% on SDK channels. Press Play http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-dec/sh5ys/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc Get your 2024 wrapped 🎁 with Supersonic! In the last SuperMonday of 2024, Supersonic experts reviewed the year’s hottest trends and gave their predictions for 2025. Weren’t able to catch it live? Watch it now http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-dec/sh5ys/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc Watch it now http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-dec/sh5ys/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc Ready to submit your game? Submit your game http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-dec/sh5yw/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc Submit your game http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-dec/sh5yw/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/company-supersonic-studios/sh5yz/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/supersonic-studios-/sh5z3/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/annel-UC8GQmIY3Bb4HbFHBbm3z0eA/sh5z6/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDmlrPMgRQd-DjCxNg8cLuCTkA7iOMc http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/-medium-email-utm-campaign-dec/sh5z9/718011386/h/VxsObrIfii5KmDml...

Ufo, catch us at industry events to explore AI-driven strategies for Apple Search Ads and ASO. Stay ahead of the curve—catch us at an event near you! 📍 Pocket Gamer Connects London on Jan. 20-21 Pocket Gamer Connects London (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VX5cB36qZBNDW8HG9k_80HZS5W3cF4jk5qMLNVN3wqV6g2-d1zW50kgx26lZ3lDW86Ngq-8rNsC5W8v9CDW3JsTbgW3zQF5J8167VDW72_8-83xZYhDW3bh0DT2_xcgDW6PLspy9klKYQW7JP65J6j8mDPV5f3qd1L3HL9W8sfSLC7KQTY8W2Ct3672QJgXXN5xw-sNrFmjdW5PlX6P7hhfqyW7cKHKP7vlgWGW2z2kjg9m4mRQW2NRbMp2sLrsCW7cw27V3Jp1rwf6WrbBK04 ) 2,500 attendees, 250+ expert speakers, and an iconic venue—The Brewery. Join us to discover cutting-edge strategies for mobile app growth across paid and organic channels. Don’t miss our workshop, "Conquering the Multichannel Battlefield with Wargaming & SplitMetrics Agency," where we’ll dive into a real-world case study and emerging trends, revealing how to build winning strategies across the App Store, Google Play, Steam, and beyond in 2025. Date: 2025-01-16T15:08:23+00:00
Body:
Let’s grab a coffee and talk all things mobile growth SplitMetrics (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VWmxDN2ZJXT2W1NXwNl3GHWV2W1KLHGL5qVk_cN4KxWL-3pxJzW69sMD-6lZ3m8W450m061nFW_HW4F1FtQ4bN-5RW7qhPKw3ZJSxwW11FjCp7DZRxmW54pcMV1-y-fkW3cYSwS8pHSjHN1jXw33Kzv6qW70CQyC3-MyYCW2s65NY2n5L8bW7nKv7711QzgGW6gwkRy16DkTqW3SSR-T55HG5VW8F42-H21hKZwW25k48G8_C1q4W6xqjvY1fFsZrW4sfzyZ51Tg2dN8lmxKGNqdV0W70WK3x76TClNN2HB0bJfgdgwW31V6yv8rMPZFf3y6FK-04 ) Hi Ufo, Pocket Gamer Connects London is just around the corner! Are you attending? Let’s meet up for a chat over coffee (or tea!) and talk about mobile growth, user acquisition, and everything in between. Book a meeting with the SplitMetrics team—we’d love to connect! Thomas Kriebernegg General Manager, SplitMetrics Agency A mobile app growth expert with 20+ years of experience, Thomas specializes in digital marketing, AI-driven strategies, and App Store Optimization (ASO). Book a Meeting → (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VWmxDN2ZJXT2W1NXwNl3GHWV2W1KLHGL5qVk_cN4KxWLn2-d1zW50kgx26lZ3kyW24jsG28K8lwkW5SRCX81gbsmJW7phsWV8vSVjdW6dpPzg6Cl46WW54Gbnq5wnM38W51jxhM3mnTcrW4y9RTc8QB-fFW2QlpSr5n25LHW3XX9cZ1N26C3W2dZM5t42FYRPW94bM4s6v6qJTW33mz6Y4_d4rrW5Ltrd365cKwWW86XnXz2ZjbD4W2XX0Br8t2q2wW45wM-w53hCJmf8WKdHM04 ) Eugene Lesechko Head of Sales UK/I MENA A seasoned AdTech expert with 15+ years of experience in digital advertising, Eugene specializes in Apple Search Ads, omnichannel campaigns, and both paid and organic marketing strategies. Book a Meeting → (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VWmxDN2ZJXT2W1NXwNl3GHWV2W1KLHGL5qVk_cN4KxWLn2-d1zW50kgx26lZ3m_W1zLV2x39v5QmW1j0KM4626D8_N581F5cHc232W5xJlv07kVrPGW48sMkK4nnF3lW5LWcJl5xzjV4W7209MT2lZZHZW4p_wPS8NkqHJW32WbhX3mwwYtW4VPLnn6jkV_9W5g5Mk34nM6bTW3Rw3zB65vqpYN6Jg4W1V5jT9W4wJQL395tMQPVsn2-h1PD87TW27vNxg5c218Gf26r1W-04 ) James Jones Account Executive A skilled AdTech expert with 5+ years of experience, James helps leading brands grow their business with high-performing digital campaigns. Body:
Ufo, learn more about how this partnership can help your business SplitMetrics (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VX7lpp4vJpM5W1JTt_J3xFXXkW8cYYgJ5rlQWQM_h9pn3pxJzW6N1vHY6lZ3mWW6WkDQh5LSVbDN5LmB8FTYvt1W3LS2FW3KqGbLW88bxz34p7-ttW5c5wsC166WPxW4lRlLK7RLvpWW3nsnt19bm9gtN1w-mp-Lx8wnW5R9TJb1FZHxBVhm0Tz1NRgqCM9_7dFkY7zWN6TvNHKtQwLfW1BCV-G6bNJ33W4qCpXq8n4pdyW6b3xXL6Ngrr_W3ZvCLX5bprLkW2mSlxs3sR_7cV7BPkJ6lbmQjV33sbB94r3HWW5NxwFx6sl0KvW62Gsfw3W4QWDW58rtDg2kN7ylf5tm-cK04 ) Hi Ufo, We’re thrilled to announce that SplitMetrics has become a Premier Partner by AppsFlyer, the global leader in marketing measurement, attribution, and data analytics. Learn more about how this partnership can help your business: Read the Full Press Release (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VX7lpp4vJpM5W1JTt_J3xFXXkW8cYYgJ5rlQWQM_h9qz3pxJzW95jsWP6lZ3pZW44L4122TysPfN3vDQCC30Y3YN4VfbKwCS-L_MHyNBr8gG8RW17Fj8C6QXDsNW5HM9Dv3WwDkmW919Lch5GNxCmVgfh1z7025h-W3_QR6t6lddmRW6Ngbyt5zC-0sW6mLMc31LqKw0Vf5jJ18WfrFkW1YgNbS5849YCW7WwTjp94FLCRW4-G_qf3sp0pjW6yKk2L1gY5gvN5H7lflxy_vZW1c-_l551zHq0VyFgxk5q5z6sN8DyX3ZF7nxnW6sz2qY6cpHVrW6Y0zLt7rpyslW6GdfmS2WRtgDW2MZv2P7j9y7yN8m_x66FN2nfW4J3rkT7bySqNW5kcLdV2RzPjTMK-PVgfwQzyW64x5V91H0nvHW5Z1b-p3-qJytf7r6yDq04 ) The Premier Partner recognition underscores our commitment to providing our customers with the most advanced and effective solutions for measuring and optimizing their mobile app marketing efforts. What does it mean for you? Becoming a Premier Partner is about more than just technical integration. It reflects the strong collaboration between SplitMetrics and AppsFlyer and brings these key benefits to our customers: - Certified expertise: Our team has completed the AppsFlyer Essentials Certification Program for partners, ensuring we deliver the best support and guidance for your needs. - Fast-track support: We maintain a direct communication line with AppsFlyer to address any measurement issues you may face quickly and effectively. - Top-tier standards: The robust integration of SplitMetrics Acquire and AppsFlyer’s mobile measurement platform empowers you to maximize your Apple Search Ads performance. This partnership allows us to deliver greater value to our customers and enable them to succeed in a competitive mobile market. Curious how the synergy of SplitMetrics Acquire and AppsFlyer can fuel your app growth? Discover how to make the most of Keyword Research & Monitoring tools with our up-to-date guide (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VX7c4F2J9K2vW7pMndx4HtmYVW58c1_75rK3LHN8yKgDW3pxJzW95jsWP6lZ3kyW6FpZMn1Ph5yvW6VwqS74cl1_9W5LYCh63sWyP2N6lRmFG7-rBzW1YZtwB6Mv2x9W4Nsw4c8TJVQ_F21Q7Bj8XT6W3tpqsH2Pdp9qW5yZJQP8RDyk0W1xbqYW8gkGTbW2lhxR98V0TLgW7Mk0H27ybHT_W79bzZX3Fy_4YW40msGH2Mjz1bW9bLWFg79VNdXW5Jfjvy6dPHD7W3PvMNg4HLF8_W3VD1BS7m99HSW3sB46s5SmK6RW4ZyX2R7RJBX0Vxj0Zv3Yfz0GV8fMpd1bbC3vW4BtJwj32_Rv8W93vMFg2wg3LtW3cK2pZ3_0dfKW4pKcdB6RqY7qW1gX2nL5t3Vv3W2RrBHn1LD2jrW2kHGvY7sVkT8W6VgMt04XT8Hjd39-SP04 ) , featuring tips to streamline your ASO workflow. From: Supersonic <supersonic-communications@unity3d.com>

Date: 2025-03-20T02:27:59-06:00
Body:
Learn how to turn first-time users into long-term players with our experts http://go.pardot.com/e/989512/9196-WN-GSDpUkDIR16FjOuJdOjuMw/vjp75/817953010/h/eMqaBZacPLQN-_D355I8ZbjFfEBU51l2PFnB65jTHR4 Hi! Body:
Don’t miss your chance to save an additional 30% off early-bird passes for Unite 2025 in Barcelona, November 19-20. ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ "Unity" <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12163-2025-09-GLBL-Unite-2025-Early-Bid-Ending&utm_content=MESD-12163-2025-09-GLBL-EN-Ent-Games-Earlybird3Spain-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=17236&elqTrackId=3dfe63ff13c64ae3addfe40990a785fe&elq=990bd9bcbb9347fabbf3cdd31e06bc69&elqaid=37614&elqat=1&elqak=8AF590F6044D82B93EE4C3AA9D4EA053AAFFB9277012BDB4C6C41715300F10EE613F> View in browser <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/es?s=795651218&e=26879609&elqTrackId=a7fc0838320d4ab99c43a716a87aa41c&target=_blank&elq=990bd9bcbb9347fabbf3cdd31e06bc69&elqaid=37614&elqat=1&elqak=8AF55C5ED6AB3D6EC0ABE444F865D331C484B9277012BDB4C6C41715300F10EE613F> "Unite 2025 Barcelona" <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12163-2025-09-GLBL-Unite-2025-Early-Bid-Ending&utm_content=MESD-12163-2025-09-GLBL-EN-Ent-Games-Earlybird3Spain-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=17792&elqTrackId=40bf018e455b4afcb9162faf7f500ddd&elq=990bd9bcbb9347fabbf3cdd31e06bc69&elqaid=37614&elqat=1&elqak=8AF5E500C31310B570065CB124FD05398BFFB9277012BDB4C6C41715300F10EE613F> Don’t wait – get your Unite 2025 pass today. It’s your last chance for an early-bird ticket*. Save 25%, PLUS an additional 30% for Spain locals! Register now <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12163-2025-09-GLBL-Unite-2025-Early-Bid-Ending&utm_content=MESD-12163-2025-09-GLBL-EN-Ent-Games-Earlybird3Spain-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=17792&elqTrackId=f8bebfd4c4424caca7ee9058f1640c67&elq=990bd9bcbb9347fabbf3cdd31e06bc69&elqaid=37614&elqat=1&elqak=8AF56E3EA55F752ED68E2666753ACA328216B9277012BDB4C6C41715300F10EE613F> Unite will be here before you know it, so now is the time to secure your spot and join us in Barcelona, November 19–20. We’ll be kicking off the conference by diving into our 2025 Keynote, followed by speaking sessions, live demos, and the Unite After-Party. "Unite After-Party" <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12163-2025-09-GLBL-Unite-2025-Early-Bid-Ending&utm_content=MESD-12163-2025-09-GLBL-EN-Ent-Games-Earlybird3Spain-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=17792&elqTrackId=02523ecd2efb48b1878172279f20d97c&elq=990bd9bcbb9347fabbf3cdd31e06bc69&elqaid=37614&elqat=1&elqak=8AF58B7D596E710C417EE32D9AB47345661FB9277012BDB4C6C41715300F10EE613F> "Live demos" <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12163-2025-09-GLBL-Unite-2025-Early-Bid-Ending&utm_content=MESD-12163-2025-09-GLBL-EN-Ent-Games-Earlybird3Spain-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=17792&elqTrackId=b7bb04aee07743a293a1c3a35f118c33&elq=990bd9bcbb9347fabbf3cdd31e06bc69&elqaid=37614&elqat=1&elqak=8AF54BED5BEAD16FA72E84D190561EA8EFCEB9277012BDB4C6C41715300F10EE613F> "Speaking sessions" <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12163-2025-09-GLBL-Unite-2025-Early-Bid-Ending&utm_content=MESD-12163-2025-09-GLBL-EN-Ent-Games-Earlybird3Spain-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=17792&elqTrackId=240f7162b8d641d2bb21684ec447a709&elq=990bd9bcbb9347fabbf3cdd31e06bc69&elqaid=37614&elqat=1&elqak=8AF53DA34612BD003DF835FC739C93E56569B9277012BDB4C6C41715300F10EE613F> Spain residents As a resident of Spain, you’re eligible to receive an additional 30% off your early-bird pass! This discount is available on both single and group pass purchases and will be automatically applied at checkout, while supplies last. ‌ Alumni discount – Additional 20% off early-bird pricing for both single and group pass purchases. This will be automatically applied at checkout for anyone who attended Unite in 2023 or 2024. Group discount Bringing your team? Groups of 3–10 can save even more with early-bird group pricing at €499 per ticket – €100 lower than the standard early-bird rate. Education pass Qualified students and educators can attend Unite 2025 for just €50, while supplies last. Content for every creator With over 50 breakout sessions across two days, there is something for everyone at Unite. Here’s a sneak peek of some highlights: "Advanced performance tips and tricks" <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12163-2025-09-GLBL-Unite-2025-Early-Bid-Ending&utm_content=MESD-12163-2025-09-GLBL-EN-Ent-Games-Earlybird3Spain-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=20667&elqTrackId=d34ae641f294434996bb533a4568b758&elq=990bd9bc...

Subject: Is ChatGPT enough for your app growth?
From: Ariana Cardoso <ariana.cardoso@splitmetrics.com>
To: ufosnowboard@gmail.com
Date: 2025-09-24T10:47:44+01:00
Body:
Why generic AI can’t deliver the ROI that purpose-built AI does. 600х314_Email #2 (8) (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/MWjnRf21_tpW3HmFFd3-kfB-W3rtmkr5CRS7rN2lhp0Y31yXlW69sMD-6lZ3mhW1PpH9M4FKrkzW9kGJC33Wk7DHN1r6rPhStBvvN5fbMgqmjhMyN7k9gM1q67FGN2PcXX4lYdhBW5-5GR26vsxY3W70g0vL2Bj6ZCVY79P69ddjqZN2-xCV8zQ-GWW2QZJr_85VcwkW6NWQZJ7r-YYXN1TNbmLQHYGhW3nxQr81K-cgBW34DcT_6qYpHxN6JG3_sZMF-VW61JXsQ3vwyWyW1gY-d07p08XtW6yM-cW1xVNpyW4Tmxw63VMwMRf6tb26-04 ) Hi there 👋 Here’s the problem with most AI tools: they try to do everything. And in the real world, this lack of specialization means they fail at the workflows that actually matter for your app growth. We put ChatGPT and Iris, SplitMetrics AI Agent to the test with the same app marketing question. Comparison Iris x ChatGPT-1 (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/MWjnRf21_tpW3HmFFd3-kfB-W3rtmkr5CRS7rN2lhp0Y31yXlW69sMD-6lZ3mhW1PpH9M4FKrkzW9kGJC33Wk7DHN1r6rPhStBvvN5fbMgqmjhMyN7k9gM1q67FGN2PcXX4lYdhBW5-5GR26vsxY3W70g0vL2Bj6ZCVY79P69ddjqZN2-xCV8zQ-GWW2QZJr_85VcwkW6NWQZJ7r-YYXN1TNbmLQHYGhW3nxQr81K-cgBW34DcT_6qYpHxN6JG3_sZMF-VW61JXsQ3vwyWyW1gY-d07p08XtW6yM-cW1xVNpyW4Tmxw63VMwMRf6tb26-04 ) The difference is clear. ChatGPT and generic AI tools: 👉 Lack deep domain-specific knowledge and contextual depth, preventing the ability to get industry-specific insights. 👉 General-purpose AI can’t handle real-world app data, since it isn’t trained on industry specific datasets. 👉 Don’t holistically connect your app performance with market and competitor data across Apple Ads & ASO. 👉 Still requires your manual data gathering, formatting, comparing dashboards and a more hands-on approach. Generalist AI like ChatGPT can’t drive real app growth. ✨ Iris is different. Vertical AI tools are fine-tuned on industry-specific data, and built for precision, speed and measurable ROI. Learn more about Iris → (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/MWjnRf21_tpW3HmFFd3-kfB-W3rtmkr5CRS7rN2lhp0Y31yXlW69sMD-6lZ3mhW1PpH9M4FKrkzW9kGJC33Wk7DHN1r6rPhStBvvN5fbMgqmjhMyN7k9gM1q67FGN2PcXX4lYdhBW5-5GR26vsxY3W70g0vL2Bj6ZCVY79P69ddjqZN2-xCV8zQ-GWW2QZJr_85VcwkW6NWQZJ7r-YYXN1TNbmLQHYGhW3nxQr81K-cgBW34DcT_6qYpHxN6JG3_sZMF-VW61JXsQ3vwyWyW1gY-d07p08XtW6yM-cW1xVNpyW4Tmxw63VMwMRf6tb26-04 ) Iris is your AI Agent for profitable app growth: ✅ Trained on $2B+ in ad spend and 10+ years of mobile growth expertise ✅ Powered by SplitMetrics Acquire & App Radar datasets ✅ Designed to connect ASO and Apple Ads into one growth strategy ✅ Embedded right where you work (Slack), delivering reliable decisions you can act on ✅ Powered with real-time market data With Iris, you don’t get vague advice. You get ROI-focused recommendations you can trust, tailored to your app, that help you drive up to 25% more revenue. Want to try it for yourself? To see what Iris can deliver, set your dedicated session. Request a call→ (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/MWjnRf21_tpW3HmFFd3-kfB-W3rtmkr5CRS7rW2lhp014Kt8y3V1J0Lf8Ng7j8VdFhmd2P_sspW35D1DQ41Q1mtW3RflFF5c3__DW4nVbr93XW1hSW63wkTy8LSnnJW6wBLtz3nrt0wW1N2My_3VQN18N3pTwy8jwsP8W5ZkxJP7tBJNmW5WSl6S2g1TLrW4VG-MD8CvkCMW3hBX604Rph6JW8NcZsh7LGjGqW3w9kqK7Qq5G623R2 ) “Iris proved to be a helpful assistant, especially when we noticed sudden shifts in performance. When we saw increased competition on our brand, Iris helped us uncover bidders’ keyword strategies, focus geos, and custom product page activity within minutes.” Eivydas Pranciulis, Senior User Acquisition Manager at NordVPN Learn more about Iris → (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/MWjnRf21_tpW3HmFFd3-kfB-W3rtmkr5CRS7rN2lhp0Y31yXlW69sMD-6lZ3mhW1PpH9M4FKrkzW9kGJC33Wk7DHN1r6rPhStBvvN5fbMgqmjhMyN7k9gM1q67FGN2PcXX4lYdhBW5-5GR26vsxY3W70g0vL2Bj6ZCVY79P69ddjqZN2-xCV8zQ-GWW2QZJr_85VcwkW6NWQZJ7r-YYXN1TNbmLQHYGhW3nxQr81K-cgBW34DcT_6qYpHxN6JG3_sZMF-VW61JXsQ3vwyWyW1gY-d07p08XtW6yM-cW1xVNpyW4Tmxw63VMwMRf6tb26-04 ) Best regards, The SplitMetrics Team SplitMetrics_Ai_Agent_footer (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/MWjnRf21_tpW3HmFFd3-kfB-W3rtmkr5CRS7rN2lhp1d38cwqW6N1vHY6lZ3ncW6ZW2RQ6H2wp-W7WCmJb46ZxxyW2jZS3C3njFRhW2HTWv470r7yNN4M449j_4DxZVGmVLs562scZW5SG6jf3hkT_dN5Ry52NjgCfYVnpMYm7Zgnr7W6Zc31B2rScbrVSkZN47r2sjfW39GwFL2mdDdTW38HQFK3MN-F4W2wHPQ76rMl6yVhFRp68zCLfrW8VtKQS4FW9l_Vd1sdY5BM8ZyN43HymbSQ3MhW5kZVRG3VtxQTW95vz7J82pzgNTjNjs3Lc2bPW6b8LS_4YfmBHf51wb2-04 ) Facebook (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/MWjnRf21_tpW3HmFFd3-kfB-W3rtmkr5CRS7rN2lhp0l2-d1zW50kgx26lZ3p6W7k6tr57wwyz5W38FX-v3TGsF-VJYWZr1jbh8JW36MwN65n1tWkVssvBh8H_7SVW4HJ7Cd8KZ9rzW1GtQzx262P1sW2cJ9Q_2Lr81KW9hmhyS85XxwMW10Y20_5qdPdRW3_RtYx9hjP7jW6wBqnR3KS1g0W4cLb7R6r_3b5W93PzK-5BQp-6W62kQg46bj0cmN5RKH9grw5_df1D_tJ604 ) LinkedIn (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/MWjnRf21_tpW3HmFFd3-kfB-W3rtmkr5CRS7rN2lhp0l2-d1zW50kgx26lZ3lQW5twHyj3kjjKTW5tNkPW2thGJQW80KDwt2lxV5QW7Yg1XC94LGFlW1jRhW86BtmLgMW9HJXpfrB6W827Hyx202_mFN2FCWRPLTXNpW7Yxz1X8c9zX6W3W20vh4B24Q_...

Body:
Secure your spot today. Don’t miss Unite 2025 – an unforgettable experience in Barcelona, November 19-20. ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ "Unity" <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12582-2025-09-GLBL-Unite-2025-General-Promotion-Email&utm_content=MESD-12582-2025-10-GLBL-EN-Ent-Unite-GeneralPromo-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=17236&elqTrackId=c2c718766d53436fb3b422f2b9eb8e65&elq=b3b3eff9fc3a48b3a4b278f1efb17faa&elqaid=37731&elqat=1&elqak=8AF5F632067FA53AB6305E958A1A6DBF9A8DC9A83171CF40C9C70C0E10854D9A9CEE> View in browser <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/es?s=795651218&e=26894497&elqTrackId=a7fc0838320d4ab99c43a716a87aa41c&target=_blank&elq=b3b3eff9fc3a48b3a4b278f1efb17faa&elqaid=37731&elqat=1&elqak=8AF5E741DA1B83A503DD9318C0EB2B33C321C9A83171CF40C9C70C0E10854D9A9CEE> "Unite 2025 is almost here - join us!" <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12582-2025-09-GLBL-Unite-2025-General-Promotion-Email&utm_content=MESD-12582-2025-10-GLBL-EN-Ent-Unite-GeneralPromo-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=17792&elqTrackId=c669b4942c6c4259adf96ce29951e525&elq=b3b3eff9fc3a48b3a4b278f1efb17faa&elqaid=37731&elqat=1&elqak=8AF52AB6A394687FA730BFD7984EC20FA57BC9A83171CF40C9C70C0E10854D9A9CEE> Step into what’s next at Unite 2025. Unite 2025 is nearly here—join us in Barcelona for a transformative experience designed to fuel your creativity and accelerate your career. Register now <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12582-2025-09-GLBL-Unite-2025-General-Promotion-Email&utm_content=MESD-12582-2025-10-GLBL-EN-Ent-Unite-GeneralPromo-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=17792&elqTrackId=b2645aac270f4eb4b4f64be9aaf16c08&elq=b3b3eff9fc3a48b3a4b278f1efb17faa&elqaid=37731&elqat=1&elqak=8AF524BB28A17E6F00BB578008C2C72DB53CC9A83171CF40C9C70C0E10854D9A9CEE> Don’t miss your chance to be part of Unite 2025 <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12582-2025-09-GLBL-Unite-2025-General-Promotion-Email&utm_content=MESD-12582-2025-10-GLBL-EN-Ent-Unite-GeneralPromo-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=17792&elqTrackId=d2b8ad90b4174c6099736b7b54840093&elq=b3b3eff9fc3a48b3a4b278f1efb17faa&elqaid=37731&elqat=1&elqak=8AF59869536AE5173884B3C3B4A29E6E76BBC9A83171CF40C9C70C0E10854D9A9CEE>, November 19–20, in Barcelona, Spain. text:
Subject: AI for App Marketers, October 2025: Smarter positioning. Faster insights. Better ROAS.
From: SplitMetrics Team <hello@splitmetrics.com>
To: ufosnowboard@gmail.com
Date: 2025-10-15T09:12:57+01:00
Body:
This month’s AI for App Marketers brings research + case studies you can apply today. How Top Apps Position AI Features — and Real Results from the Field Hi Ufo, AI is no longer a back-end technology. It’s becoming a front-row feature — and app marketers need to know how to position it, promote it, and measure its impact. This month, we explore how leading apps highlight their AI features on the App Store, plus two real-world case studies showing how AI is already streamlining workflows and driving app growth. Let’s dive in 👇 🔍 How Top Apps Showcase AI Features on the App Store AI is everywhere in 2025, but not every app nails the way it’s presented. SplitMetrics’ latest research analyzed how top-ranking iOS apps across categories communicate AI functionality in their titles, descriptions, and visuals. Here’s what stood out: - “AI” in titles is rare — only a handful of top apps include it directly, but when they do, it’s paired with strong value props like “personalized,” “instant,” or “smart.” - Screenshots do the heavy lifting — many apps use visuals to highlight “AI-powered” workflows (e.g., content generation, recommendations) rather than just stating it. - Feature over function — successful apps don’t market “AI” itself, but the outcome it drives: faster editing, smarter recommendations, more personalized experiences. - Consistency wins — apps that align messaging across titles, descriptions, and visuals build stronger trust and clearer positioning. 📊 Category analysis: productivity and photo & video apps lead the way, while lifestyle apps lag behind — leaving plenty of room for differentiation. “Not too surprising to see Lifestyle apps lagging behind — many of them haven’t embraced modern AI tech yet. But that’s exactly where the opportunity lies: even light AI integration, paired with smart messaging, can help marketers stand out in a category that’s still catching up.” Thomas Kriebernegg General Manager at SplitMetrics Agency 💡 The takeaway? Market the benefit, not the buzzword. Users care about results — speed, quality, personalization — more than the underlying tech. 🔗 Read the full research → (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VVBH6Z49cH0vN4NBDctfQ0WcV3Z50p5DGK30N3V8l9W3pxJzW8wLKSR6lZ3lGW6ZHBvQ88pHy1W1KFKFD295mpQW6s7JJz3_fY6LW2tVLG58gLFSmW5NhnyN1-_HZ1VLqyXk843ms6W3lWR5J5f8Gv8N1KkgJyRydrLW3jc8DC2ghYWhW2CS5BM3zRDdvW5b_x3r2dT7K2W6HDJq1532CHHW1mfz8T9kGmmfVrXngT98PDSDW2n5Llw8VCBMQW4-4GBk5qc28yW3JGzj27_rC4YW2JlPBt1SJ8CnW25zScK3Dp8k7W8Fq2Hs2bD9G4W8mphzV32HbvfN6XfY4PS-KQjW6YKVQW9ctB9fW2S4wkg2QJS8PW85X1Kg4n4GRTW5ms4ld5FCJ2XW6H1mZ82C8LdqW9gpJ5p4wzNrGf105PC004 ) 🧠 How Flo Used AI Agent Iris for Keyword Strategy & Market Insights AI isn’t just changing how apps present themselves — it’s transforming how marketers work behind the scenes. Flo, the #1 women’s health app, joined the Splitmetrics’ Iris AI Agent (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VVBH6Z49cH0vN4NBDctfQ0WcV3Z50p5DGK30N3V8l903pxJzW6N1vHY6lZ3mPW8ShM2f5WZQvyW7yWB2-87KzmGN5Kcgtlfq8b7N82sth-zHkSqW3vd9sD5dy4yCW6BhJb558pJSdVtMCm16Hk7ztW7Xz-_G7m60g_W1dNh3p9k-46GW4MqtNz8h3-w3W4_ZcBy5KhrpgVsm7FF69l1nzW5DxQhK4hysTgW3ZYbjN7KNcFVW21JSrz7r1Zb4W3BKHlL8C5sNLW3sTsqF4zZ39mW4KQ3nX4vc2XdW4hLD8738pFdLW17bg_95z9J8SW191pkP152rdNW91bBkJ95SLl9f6QSmjd04 ) beta to explore how AI could make keyword research more efficient, accelerate competitor analysis, and unlock actionable market insights for Apple Ads — all without disrupting their existing workflow. Rather than solving just one pain point, their goal was to test whether Iris could enhance day-to-day operations and bring more speed and clarity to decision-making. With Iris, Flo was able to: - Analyze search results to uncover hidden keyword opportunities. - Spot competitor strategies faster, without hours of manual digging. - Build data-driven keyword clusters that shaped campaigns more effectively. Beyond Flo’s case, Iris is designed to go further — offering competitor insights and market trends, keyword and creative optimization, and automated recommendations that help marketers make faster, more confident decisions. Keyword analysis with Iris (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VVBH6Z49cH0vN4NBDctfQ0WcV3Z50p5DGK30N3V8l9W3pxJzW8wLKSR6lZ3mGW95c4FH8Mp9vpN7Yv6F15566TW7Ly7lR4PzFq2W19rJ6g4SNFc9N1_p5q9yv0MQW7gwXkq6bkHNsW14g15h649mV3W4qVg3S4vThlwW8B5Sj18zqh3bW3xzT3k8wpqk9W8VRVx814zZQXW2qt1sl39w5PQW5Dkmlg4GPG06W3JP-0z50gVWmW8SGgbL8WZ9FfW7NB-Wk8ZbRM2N993T7zRMBQ8VnYgG16hXZybW6M7xNr4RJ00sW8TsM1H7_rJJcW8k7dfz17KJ4-W8Q3fsw7lHcSYW8st7SB8mPf1YW17tQ6n9jmjRdV-tgn0812WV0W4shYYM8j27jzW3F7yhh6xQxGfW99sL_-3G37RNf1WqPW804 ) Learn more about Iris (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VVBH6Z49cH0vN4NBDctfQ0WcV3Z50p5DGK30N3V8l903pxJzW6N1vHY6lZ3mPW8ShM2f5WZQvyW7yWB2-87KzmGN5Kcgtlfq8b7N82sth-zHkSqW3vd9sD5dy4yCW6BhJb558pJSdVtMCm16Hk7ztW7Xz-_G7m60g_W1dNh3p9k-46GW4MqtNz8h3-w3W4_ZcBy5KhrpgVsm7FF69l1nzW5DxQhK4hysTgW3ZYbjN7KNcFVW21JSrz7r1Zb4W3BKHlL8C5sNLW3sTsqF4zZ39mW4KQ...

text:
Subject: Unite 2025 Keynote – you won’t want to miss this
From: Unity <info@unity3d.com>
To: ufosnowboard@gmail.com
Date: 2025-10-22T03:01:40-04:00
Body:
Join us November 19-20 for the latest news, product announcements, feature reveals, networking, 50+ breakout sessions, and more. ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ "Unity" <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12643-2025-10-GLBL-Unite 2025-Keynote-Announcement-Email&utm_content=MESD-12643-2025-10-GLBL-EN-Ent-Unite-KeynoteAnnouncement-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=17236&elqTrackId=cbe0a5a6a00e44cda183ab4ebc47dd80&elq=a8e6d2da91c340038ef79f754b67ec48&elqaid=37773&elqat=1&elqak=8AF5478680480B01E978E02CA50A2FA7F4CD73E0B5E2C5BFB825AA702CCEB1BBF891> View in browser <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/es?s=795651218&e=26901791&elqTrackId=a7fc0838320d4ab99c43a716a87aa41c&target=_blank&elq=a8e6d2da91c340038ef79f754b67ec48&elqaid=37773&elqat=1&elqak=8AF532234CB4DB0F430617CBB8C4CAA61C1A73E0B5E2C5BFB825AA702CCEB1BBF891> "Unite 2025 is almost here - join us!" <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12643-2025-10-GLBL-Unite 2025-Keynote-Announcement-Email&utm_content=MESD-12643-2025-10-GLBL-EN-Ent-Unite-KeynoteAnnouncement-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=17792&elqTrackId=089fcd0c041049cf860def5e4782093b&elq=a8e6d2da91c340038ef79f754b67ec48&elqaid=37773&elqat=1&elqak=8AF5E1B35126E3AE813C0DCFAC05C0E7C16173E0B5E2C5BFB825AA702CCEB1BBF891> Unite 2025 Keynote Don’t miss your chance to experience our annual Keynote LIVE from Barcelona. Register now <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12643-2025-10-GLBL-Unite 2025-Keynote-Announcement-Email&utm_content=MESD-12643-2025-10-GLBL-EN-Ent-Unite-KeynoteAnnouncement-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=17792&elqTrackId=ca4f047414e248d582d00cf427b7ab71&elq=a8e6d2da91c340038ef79f754b67ec48&elqaid=37773&elqat=1&elqak=8AF58D76ED70EECBBC1FBB1A39AFEBCF497273E0B5E2C5BFB825AA702CCEB1BBF891> Join us in person on November 19 to learn how Unity is powering new ways of developing, deploying, and helping players discover incredible games. We’ll share the latest Unity news, reveal some exciting features, and showcase the studios and stories behind some of 2025’s most thrilling gaming successes, including PEAK and Subway Surfers. "Unite 2025 Keynote" <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12643-2025-10-GLBL-Unite 2025-Keynote-Announcement-Email&utm_content=MESD-12643-2025-10-GLBL-EN-Ent-Unite-KeynoteAnnouncement-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=17792&elqTrackId=57160ef9facf4d0fb9152f01d313cf43&elq=a8e6d2da91c340038ef79f754b67ec48&elqaid=37773&elqat=1&elqak=8AF56449DBB9EC203CBC3D943A9467601F4473E0B5E2C5BFB825AA702CCEB1BBF891> "Unite 2025 Keynote" <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12643-2025-10-GLBL-Unite 2025-Keynote-Announcement-Email&utm_content=MESD-12643-2025-10-GLBL-EN-Ent-Unite-KeynoteAnnouncement-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=17792&elqTrackId=1bc4d008c0254de1b0aa543b79c22ef5&elq=a8e6d2da91c340038ef79f754b67ec48&elqaid=37773&elqat=1&elqak=8AF5F116407E834780E52584E53F16CBD69773E0B5E2C5BFB825AA702CCEB1BBF891> From novice to expert, there’s something for everyone at Unite After experiencing our thrilling Keynote, you’ll be able to attend over 50 lively breakout sessions across two full days. Check out to full session schedule <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Other_global_Unite_MESD-12643-2025-10-GLBL-Unite 2025-Keynote-Announcement-Email&utm_content=MESD-12643-2025-10-GLBL-EN-Ent-Unite-KeynoteAnnouncement-Event-01.html&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=20575&elqTrackId=4971c32a676941a5a1925d05f569204b&elq=a8e6d2da91c340038ef79f754b67ec48&elqaid=37773&elqat=1&elqak=8AF595F908B6A85911ACFF9FB1CFE2152ABD73E0B5E2C5BFB825AA702CCEB1BBF891> and take a look at the themes you can look forward to: ‌ *Multiplatform game development – Get best practices, tips, and learnings about bringing your game to multiple platforms including web, mobile, PC, console, XR and more. *Graphics and creative tooling – Achieve your game’s visual target with high performance, flexible rendering, animation tooling and more. *Multiplayer games – Learn about all aspects of multiplayer game development from building a netcode foundation to running a multiplayer experience. *Engine extensibility – Get inspiration and practical tips for how the Unity Engine can be extended with custom tools or third party solutions. *Growing and monetizing live games – Extend the lifespan of your game with the latest products seamlessly designed to help you grow, monetize, acquire and engage users in your game. *Performance and optimization – Improve your game’s performance across a variety...

Get expert strategies on AI automation, scaling ROAS, and the 2026 growth team skill map. email_600х260_for promo emails (3) (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VWyfzz66yD08N6RgQmGGbL6_W7xsyK95Fd6ryN1m0FqY31yXlW69sMD-6lZ3pcW1c-4xh54k9jsW7Yc-3D2Sf-CgN3_mygZp7KN7W66SgVF8b6fykW7ppjkK44zXrRN6JhtgJS6RW_W22fNXm3qtJHNW7c_bys3nDhdhW8xPbF82YKYYgN53ClrbZh06vW2pBF7v6SrxJCW6CrnqG19K2F9W4CP8YR18YlFcW5rRfzK7FfgDwW7y_dKL1z0j-kN5HyVmcjn9RMW6tgNdx640cn6W8xY_T930D-L6W53xbt81KqdX8W5_M2nv92mz1mf4JJvd804 ) Hi Ufo 👋 We know how much mobile marketing has changed — and how hard it is to keep up. Between rising acquisition costs, evolving user behavior, and the pressure to “figure out AI,” the noise can be overwhelming. And the playbooks that used to work? They’re no longer enough. That’s exactly why we built App Growth Week 2025. Not as another webinar series — but as a space to pause, learn, and plan with real experts who are in the same trenches as you. "" Join the fun ------------ Unite 2025 ---------- November 19–20 -------------- Register now <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Grow-Games_global_Newsletter_MESD-12769_2025_10_GLBL_SuperStories_Newsletter&utm_content=MESD-12769-2025-10-GLBL-EN-Grw-SS-SuperStories-Newsletter-01-A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=20969&elqTrackId=7f1b41d0cb354a74957795494514320c&elq=68ae303a5ebc4c209da2000b4c7afd56&elqaid=37809&elqat=1&elqak=8AF5F360F7BA86E55F7D91F5147348F5DE8449130369540B54E284F00A4F7BE212B1> We’re heading back to Barcelona on November 19–20. Don’t miss the session by Supersonic experts Giacomo Maragliulo, Senior Manager of Creative, and Karen Levy Atias, Head of Creative. They’ll be sharing how to turn your game’s narrative into a powerful growth engine with emotional storytelling combined with AI tools on November 20, 11:30AM CET. "" Tap into top insights --------------------- Our SuperFriends at NextBigGames took a look at Conquer Countries, a decision-making idle simulation game, from Supersonic partners Ridgge to get to the bottom of what makes it a profitable player favorite. Here’s what they found. "" "" "" "" Get more actionable tips to improve your game by visiting the Supersonic resources <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Grow-Games_global_Newsletter_MESD-12769_2025_10_GLBL_SuperStories_Newsletter&utm_content=MESD-12769-2025-10-GLBL-EN-Grw-SS-SuperStories-Newsletter-01-A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=20968&elqTrackId=7a526d155fb4494795c9898b22ea5a49&elq=68ae303a5ebc4c209da2000b4c7afd56&elqaid=37809&elqat=1&elqak=8AF5E7C31B55B256AF2505865E3F0C3689DE49130369540B54E284F00A4F7BE212B1> "" Learn from our experts ---------------------- "" <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Grow-Games_global_Newsletter_MESD-12769_2025_10_GLBL_SuperStories_Newsletter&utm_content=MESD-12769-2025-10-GLBL-EN-Grw-SS-SuperStories-Newsletter-01-A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=20967&elqTrackId=ab4bca14e13e4d74954ed606cae0c47c&elq=68ae303a5ebc4c209da2000b4c7afd56&elqaid=37809&elqat=1&elqak=8AF5DB7EF54795E07F7F46CF045BDA3F33E649130369540B54E284F00A4F7BE212B1> "" <https://app.response.unity3d.com/e/er?utm_campaign=Grow-Games_global_Newsletter_MESD-12769_2025_10_GLBL_SuperStories_Newsletter&utm_content=MESD-12769-2025-10-GLBL-EN-Grw-SS-SuperStories-Newsletter-01-A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Eloqua&s=795651218&lid=20966&elqTrackId=87519d7cdc7b40fead2c5414633bbf1b&elq=68ae303a5ebc4c209da2000b4c7afd56&elqaid=37809&elqat=1&elqak=8AF5673E9FDC641BD460B766E8E1F6A954E649130369540B54E284F00A4F7BE212B1> "" Get creative ------------ Winner takes all Finding a winning creative is just the beginning. To keep your games scaling, focus on evolving winners to maximize their lifecycle and scale their results. From adding powerful intro hooks to testing UGC content, this ensures that every top creative delivers stronger engagement and lasting impact. text:
Subject: AI for App Marketers, October 2025: Smarter positioning. Faster insights. Better ROAS.
From: SplitMetrics Team <hello@splitmetrics.com>
To: ufosnowboard@gmail.com
Date: 2025-11-03T09:30:27+00:00
Body:
This month’s AI for App Marketers brings research + case studies you can apply today. How AI Is Redefining App Marketing — App Growth Week Special Hi Ufo, AI in app marketing is moving fast — and this month, it’s all about helping you keep up and get ahead. As we head into our yearly online event, App Growth Week 2025 – AI Edition, we’re diving into how AI agents can reshape app marketing teams. Let’s get into it 👇 🚀 App Growth Week 2025 – AI Edition November 18–20 | 100% Online & Free This month, we’re going all-in on AI for growth — with the largest digital event for App Marketing: 30+ experts, 15 live sessions, and 3 packed days of strategies to help you fuel your 2026 success. 🔗 Discover the agenda → (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/MVMsZ2Zk3c7W3W8dKq77sggmW2dmkKk5FqyndW3Lg8734Kt8y3V1J0Lf8MMnv8V-jybx8Px-s1W8V9d2S4vk5VfW8CBfsx4FZ252W76HKD37SlCt3W5FJRCW7S1qMhW4_kxLT4MjhgbVfh1p82TPZvNW7-S5nG1F9VLCW1vF_fv4bwHJnW386yb28v1yKfW6c4LWC3mrc8gW7NPjkl93-wD_W3qm4VL1TRP8GMg_FP22dbyr23Z2 ) App Growth Week isn’t just another webinar series. It’s a complete growth toolkit designed to help mobile marketers turn insights into action, and drive measurable impact. By registering, you’ll unlock: ✅ All 15 live sessions + recordings – watch anytime, revisit whenever you need ✅ Exclusive offers & free software trials – test the tools top marketers use, at zero cost ✅ Weekly growth resources & content freebies – templates, checklists, and insights delivered straight to your inbox ✅ Practical, ready-to-implement takeaways – created by experts to deliver measurable impact This year’s speakers will cover everything from AI-powered campaign automation and creative optimization to real-world growth playbooks from top app brands. Save your free seat (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/MVMsZ2Zk3c7W3W8dKq77sggmW2dmkKk5FqyndW3Lg8734Kt8y3V1J0Lf8MS4tsW4GQJH620H6S1N714jnH169fYW5t9__Q5TShVzW5fCdNK61pW5qW6JL1-N4wxVN-N1WrCFfqTGTfW6mQXrL1WhD0nW4kYWjn3VMwpkW9900Gb6qv9tZW46G7Ht69RhnLW3BMLzT3tLnksW59vg_H74vdTlW6C3S7927nS9GW8HxcH32D8YWT23P2 ) 🤖 How to Make AI Agents Work for App Marketers Most companies have adopted AI tools, but few have truly leveraged them to transform their business. According to a 2025 survey by S&P Global Market Intelligence (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/MVMsZ2Zk3c7W3W8dKq77sggmW2dmkKk5FqyndN3Lg87n4YNxMW50kH_H6lZ3plN1jnBW0xHhx3V-l1pG7fq7ppW5hWGvQ7SS0xgW5N7QQz6yQR_gW7dzzL_7pHz2ZW31qSnZ4BqcgGN79b3NWb_rM3W4T-8hL4bMcfWW92_DgN83kT16W8ZptDL8M-jcjW3Mgbnv7JPWLhW1H0Ck14cRsypW6NqPhn1nFLtDW4C_46K8WMV-DW2_DL6R6-XSsWW1_v82Q628BcfW7LFr-t3bFWZ6W4n02sW50Wxk5VYjMbP5Z5X1JW5_Y6_y2gL6wlW4pmgXy6PgM00W742jz77bnrvjW32wyc94Jm-VGW6q9d5q3xW3fjW90-S5q1SwVKlW8xSqDw29BqKWW4Gt0_Y7H0T-mV_6jRJ99PRj1W65GVzB9jGWnJW5kypQC4Td2yVW3gbMK-7RHfqSN3t9D6lZJ__6f5sqS-404 ) , 42% of companies abandoned their AI initiatives — and RAND Corporation (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/MVMsZ2Zk3c7W3W8dKq77sggmW2dmkKk5FqyndN3Lg87H2-d1zW5BW0B06lZ3kGW5g9J-Z2tBl5JW1v3GJR4lHgT2W1PMZD11gpSVjN7qykFfmmnBnW5k5Tsc4zLhGxW6bfrnV8Wttr0W4Qn16N5pggjvW2M63nj18kQHyV6F55M5JCkmJW1LfMs44NZrwxW4f8plW1qS2HyN62WM8zrWy7rW3xnPL52pt6p1VqgCx275YNq5W2VyKPG4_RPFQW39FW2n2xH_yHW98WfCn7mZZ4RW1BrpXv61Gp_xf5LWNyg04 ) found over 80% of AI projects fail. However, we know empirically that AI can successfully transform app marketing for any developer, as evidenced by our high-profile cases of Aveola (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/MVMsZ2Zk3c7W3W8dKq77sggmW2dmkKk5FqyndN3Lg88g2-d1zW6N1vHY6lZ3nKW9f5WMw82C62lW56n_yJ8XhBLrW13RGb-7JYGlzW1nVXsg75gzthVwn7D649H-r1W9l6j1w8S0nRvW81J_FP3sTRQfN1flxPxmvMgCVvmYqW7CSBLgV7k3rd1LzHLZW4Bs5y936XQlKW5GB8Tf3VVPL1W6VqrrH631ngMW5HYVfH6qGx6FW8RHQDZ1NPKbGW8ZYhh214NB6BW1VB8Bz1CPdlyW8Hgh-j9b-s47W409Dxp7shybXW92KPSs8hNMn1W5w0k-y5dZDXBW5GSP4V2n9950dz5SxR04 ) and Flo (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/MVMsZ2Zk3c7W3W8dKq77sggmW2dmkKk5FqyndN3Lg87H2-d1zW5BW0B06lZ3kMW3TF_J74r6DxmW2ywNv0692jJyW308h5s6zB25CW1dXxvC1Dkw-8W74Zht98_vJ_QV_D5yM6yr5rGW873RJT1_skp9W8JZBhx2Rcz2vW8Rx2Qg5HjpJ2W1vhXym12tkqRW8dZlBg58cc_9W4BNdkl5lq4SxW4m299g5S8dJYW8G13ZR9btp06W8xMCRx812MM5W7hCzPN30FdxTW6qDlms9dz2g0W7tzBVY6WFpHYdBsYyP04 ) . In our latest article, we explore how app marketers can embrace AI and AI agents (software systems that act intelligently (perceive, reason, act, learn) to pursue goals effectively. Here’s what you’ll discover: - Why the Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) paradigm is essential for reliable, ethical, and effective AI results. - The difference between horizontal AI (broad-purpose) and vertical AI (industry- or domain-specific) and why app marketing needs vertical AI for depth and accuracy. - How AI tools like Samba and Iris are already delivering measurable results - 55% ROAS uplift and freeing marketers from repetitive tasks. - Practical steps for setting up a human-AI workflow: identify bucketed tasks for the agent, define decision boundaries, embed human checks and...
