text:
Subject: The AI tactics every app marketer is stealing right now
From: SplitMetrics Team <hello@splitmetrics.com>
To: ufosnowboard@gmail.com
Date: 2025-12-02T13:04:43+00:00
Body:
This Edition breaks down what’s really working in scaling your app with AI The end of year playbook: trends and tactics reshaping app marketing Hi Ufo, As we close out 2025, one thing is clear: AI has shifted from optional to operational for app marketers. This year ended with our biggest event yet, App Growth Week 2025: AI Edition — bringing 30+ experts together to discuss the strategies, systems, and AI workflows shaping the future of mobile growth. This month’s edition wraps up the biggest lessons from AGW and looks ahead to 2026 with fresh insights on how AI is transforming ASO, UA, and creative strategy. Let’s get into it 👇 🚀 AGW 2025 Wrap-Up: The Signals That Matter App Growth Week, our yearly digital event, brings together UA Leads, ASO Managers, Growth Directors, and AI practitioners from top global apps to decode what’s changing in mobile marketing. This year’s edition featured insights from top app teams, performance leaders, and AI practitioners. And while every speaker brought something different, one theme was impossible to ignore: Marketers who master AI workflows (not just AI tools) will win in 2026. Across App Growth Week, four big signals stood out: 1. The Most Effective Teams Built Human-in-the-Loop AI Systems Multiple sessions reinforced the same idea: AI doesn’t replace decision-making. Speakers emphasized: - Clear decision boundaries between AI suggestions & human approvals - How teams break down workflows into AI-ready vs AI-supervised tasks This aligns with the Human-in-the-Loop paradigm explored in our November Newsletter Edition (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VWhy5T2mklkGW4kYTWL1s6fTCW35KrPN5GB0_HN2_Qd4z2-d1zW6N1vHY6lZ3pqW54nF8W804K-5W1rd3Ry4h-jZCVjXlDp6t6kLxW2qNB_r5W9c6LF7qVWPRJmN7W2fm4lN1ncqgQW8GyVK965dn5NW70vGlS5kW9r9N14cHQRmwFDSV9cc3v8ggGwRN3ffGBxdBn0XVYTrbl2pklgKW3l4lVS6K_lvqW474BtB4GpxBnW1jML7b4qqz9xW8VKC8028jG2JW7289C548lGFWW3xF7HY7RJ7xzVrCtPF35Vjt9N3p12CPWJkhKW4_cq9B2HTwryVsFLwd45ZxQ5f5v7rP004 ) — now confirmed as a must-have operating model heading into 2026. 2. AI-First Campaign Optimization Is Becoming the New Standard From user acquisition panels to expert deep dives, performance marketers shared a strong consensus: Manual bid adjustments and daily performance checks can slow down when scaling your app. Across sessions, speakers discussed predictive signals used for early campaign corrections, automated ROAS-based bid adjustment systems, AI-supported budget allocation, faster detection of keyword fatigue and how AI surfaces opportunities humans typically miss These trends reflect successes we’ve seen with partners using AI-powered optimization — including cases like Aveola (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VWhy5T2mklkGW4kYTWL1s6fTCW35KrPN5GB0_HN2_Qd4z2-d1zW6N1vHY6lZ3q3W8ZhLJD58w_KSW2HVn3X11kpzVW7l04sq2PQKflW8vqp2l6s-9X_W3zRVbG7v3hdWVfnxym8GJkl-W79tqm643VRbYN5R1R-LJr0czW1fyMcS4GwgjnW3gkz_83Tw8JqVVFjDm3htx1zW26K8PJ87lhQMW67knY078rRtqW17ChFq6Fwy5dW37N2Qd6yP62nW81Y6K46zc35TN1rBFLvztqvdVGk66z8HGQ7JW91YHNh3m_Sv7W8NMC3B9jMl1cW5m_sh44fBSQJW1yNtw84sWr3hf1p_js804 ) , where AI improved ROAS and reduced manual work. 2026 will see more teams move from: “AI tools as add-ons” to “AI as an assistant in campaign operations.” 3. AI Is Reshaping Creative Strategy — Not Just Creative Production One surprise from the creative optimization sessions? Teams aren’t just using AI to generate content — they’re using it to understand which narrative structures convert, which visual cues drive intent, which creative angles match user expectations at each funnel stage AI should now help you create more creatives, and faster, but also allowing for smarter creative strategy. 4. ASO Managers Are Moving Toward AI-Augmented Research Many discussions revealed that 2025 was the year ASO finally caught up with UA in the AI curve, or it should have! Top themes were AI-assisted keyword clustering, better competitive intelligence, proactive trend spotting based on search & category signals and AI-supported metadata suggestions. This mirrors what teams saw with access to Iris, our AI Agent (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VWhy5T2mklkGW4kYTWL1s6fTCW35KrPN5GB0_HN2_Qd3H2-d1zW50kgx26lZ3lyV29w1555rgnTW1CJ5Km5py1zrW3Xgj382X_4dVW67XkKx969jKyVr3STh3rjV6qVcxkkr8wwScwW4SS7rD9khPHRW5Fm-Lk8WtqX3N2lGhk-FJRLdW2_6ZtV2BrbB4N2cVlhdsmMYtW1zMQpS7NdqMzW5lYZJ949QfV-W4YJZXg6LxTyFW4G17yX1VqFFWW2g3w-080ZLbsf52Yq8804 ) — especially around keyword opportunity detection, faster competitor analysis, and market trend identification. AI-driven ASO workflows and creating alignment with your Apple Ads strategy, are clearly becoming a core part of the 2026 playbook. 2025 in Review: How AI Rewrote the Rules of App Marketing Beyond AGW, 2025 was a turning point for app marketers. Based on insights from across the year, and echoed in AGW discussions, here are the five macro-trends defining the shift: 1. Vertical AI Outperformed Horizontal AI General-purpose AI tools remained...

text:
Subject: 🎁 [End of Year Gift] 2026-ready strategy pack inside & our 2025 wrapped
From: Ariana Cardoso <ariana.cardoso@splitmetrics.com>
To: ufosnowboard@gmail.com
Date: 2025-12-23T10:38:46+00:00
Body:
Here’s the time we look back at the 2025 winning strategies and pin down which ones to double down in 2026 with our Iris-powered free resource. Plus a look back at our year at SplitMetrics. Hey Ufo 👋 2025 was the year AI got practical. At SplitMetrics, was all about pushing boundaries with AI and innovation and turning it into real growth for app teams. We’ve wrapped up the biggest moments below and prepared a special gift for you: a spreadsheet with category-specific marketing tactics analysis, high-impact strategies that defined 2025 & what to carry into 2026 (all data powered by our AI Agent Iris). Our customers love us, and it's mutual! “SplitMetrics’ team helped us strengthen our Apple Ads brand presence, gain better control over competitive placements, and continuously improve visibility across priority geos. Thanks to their structured approach, we have achieved a healthier balance between brand defense and growth campaigns, resulting in highly relevant traffic, reduced inefficient spend, and consistently stable performance.” Sergey K., Fintech Key milestones of 2025 We've released over 70 new features over the course of this year, all focused on powering up your growth. Here's to our key releases: #1 AI Agent for mobile marketing This year, SplitMetrics launched the #1 AI Agent for Apple Ads & ASO. This marks the beginning of a new era with AI-powered instant insights and market analysis. In January, Iris will evolve further, marking a new milestone for the entire industry with exciting new capabilities. AI ROAS Bid Optimization We evolved our Samba model further, introducing ROAS optimization strategies that dynamically adjust keyword bids daily based on predicted performance. Ensure optimal spend distribution across single and multi-campaign setups. Top-Loved Releases of the Year App Intelligence Gain a full view of competitors’ strategies from keywords to market share. Benchmark, analyse and spot opportunities that maximize ROI. Custom product pages Scheduler Automate custom product pages updates, refresh creatives, and test variants faster all in one place. App Overview All your ASO insights in one page. Run audits, track performance and get competitive benchmarks instantly. What We Achieved Together 🎁 End-of-Year Gift We’ve wrapped up your short-cut into 2026 - powered by Iris. Download our marketing analysis and check the strategies that moved the needle in 2025, practical tips for different app categories and the recommended actions to test in 2026. Download the spreadsheet (https://cBDXb04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZS+113/cBDXb04/VWmP735L94j_N4ZG86NcHcvpW8mS6hr5HpQW2N4-lLgz8VTy6W6N2M5R6lZ3nfW66SWWW8604xqW42JKFG34WmNbW6GlD868N4bbPN50SNjh4v1hRW4B8c2X8n6fPnW6JlmMd3sx2DtW7CqPWX5lp836N7MwVjQTKNTYW6RYLnd1zh-Y-W7vSjwB3wdFCBW40PD7k1CG5f_W7SQD-c4nyh9nW5b65ph6sYbh6W2zm2Fv29FXLHW39Zldw8Y8xBVW5rk1CS3QMXz3MLR50D6VSz7W14X2bc7v2-mwN7C7RWqnJZ25W2VhFyj7C911jW6GK_R399f5qTW64w0Kf2BFLjfW1SP9l65bWSrLW7nJYpF1bBgY-VW-m6N3jMGDMV7kKXF4Bhxs4W62R0CB4Z795gW14xwLG2FdTVXW4vx3mL7hwq0wW7Jh3661LDb-zW8V6x3R1_2VBzW6bsknD2LGmZ2VY1Cq24CGV9ZW5Qvbs14wpNR4W756HNV4HSLJLW1KdfX54lzdGqN6-f6P67yqtgW7ZDwwk6pdblXW15DMxF6D7mzZW6N7_PT2v4dp4W3KS3dB9hJVf4W5blKFD65RBp0W76TXNW26cHC1W3v_6lS3ldGQXW1x4hB21-Z5jVW5YDtbd6m-LCRW3b7j4R5m5xLRW5bd7Hp4FNjYmVynjcg7nrpWWW2chQmX7Jq3J6W4PpPTN7CVYDgVY10Tk97p4zvW64WN286x27c6W4fw96X5qm1JRW6bG8Gt3tlH15W15R7W41SRTMkW5KyV9D70c-XcW6VJ_gm93h5lbW71jnWh4SXP5kN2M5Ng3hW2Y0W8v1xs_8kJBwzN3dfl_3RL7NBW8W3Bf78jTcDVW3pcddG1z8Z2nW4zL2BJ6kcb54M8-V3NfmMpVW3kStqQ56fP9zW13rKd812q_B9N6F9rpMjmFkPW4G4pCn34szsxf7H1tWH04 ) What's Next for 2026 AI will stay at the core of how we build.
